channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Acting Labor Chief Sonderling Gains Momentum for Top Job
item.description: Acting Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling appears increasingly likely to secure a permanent nomination to lead the Department of Labor, according to Tru...

item.title: Trump: US 'Must' Respond After Iran Shot Down Apache Near Hormuz
item.description: President Donald Trump blamed Iran on Tuesday for shooting down a U.S. Army helicopter close to the Strait of Hormuz and said the United States must r...

item.title: Obama pays tribute to chef who tragically drowned at vacation compound with new honor
item.description: Obama Presidential Center launches Tafari's Kitchen, a comfort-food restaurant honoring late personal chef Tafari Campbell who drowned in 2023.

item.title: Sweatin' and Squirming: SPLC Boss Wilts Under Jim Jordan's Rapid‑Fire Judiciary Grilling
